name: Bjorn Borg AB (publ)
summary: Bj‚ąö√Č¬¨‚ąārn Borg AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, engages in the design, development, production, wholesale, and retail of underwear, sports apparel, footwear, bags, eyewear, and fragrances under the Bj‚ąö√Č¬¨‚ąārn Borg brand. It operates through Wholesale, Consumer Direct, Distributors, and Licensing segments. The company offers underwear for men, women, and children, as well as sleepwear, socks, and bras through independent retailers, apparel and sporting goods chains, department stores, Bj‚ąö√Č¬¨‚ąārn Borg stores, and e-commerce sites; and clothing collection in performance and sportswear categories for women and men through sports apparel and sporting goods retailers, department stores, Bj‚ąö√Č¬¨‚ąārn Borg stores, and e-tailers. It also provides casual and sporty designer shoes for men and women sold through independent retailers, footwear and sporting goods chains, department stores, e-tailers, and Bj‚ąö√Č¬¨‚ąārn Borg stores, as well as online through bjornborg.com; and backpacks, gym bags, and duffle bags, as well as wallets, gloves, and belts through luggage and sporting goods shops, retail chains, department stores, shop-in-shops, Bj‚ąö√Č¬¨‚ąārn Borg stores, and e-tailers. Further, the company offers frames and sunglasses through the licensee's distribution organizations, fashion boutiques, department stores, and Bj‚ąö√Č¬¨‚ąārn Borg stores. Bj‚ąö√Č¬¨‚ąārn Borg AB (publ) sells its products in Sweden, the Netherlands, Finland, Denmark, Norway, Belgium, England, Germany, Canada, the United States, Switzerland, and Slovenia. As of December 31, 2019, it operated 35 Bj‚ąö√Č¬¨‚ąārn Borg stores, including 31 group owned stores. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
